nodes.name: Nicator
nodes.summary: Nicator（Nicator）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Western nicator、Eastern nicator、Yellow-throated nicator。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated nicator
nodes.summary: The yellow-throated nicator (Nicator vireo) is a species of songbird in the family Nicatoridae. Range and habitat It is found in Angola, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, DRC, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, and Uganda. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References External links Image at ADW
